subtasks.description: Query MongoDB to count total Microsoft licenses in the license inventory
Query Snowflake to retrieve last month's Microsoft spend aggregated by category or cost center
Compose and send email summary to SAM team with license count and spend data from subtasks mongo_ms_licenses and sql_ms_spend

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks: (1) mongo_query (small tier) to count Microsoft licenses — simple aggregation on a single collection; (2) sql_gen (small tier) to retrieve last month's spend — straightforward filtered query with basic aggregation; (3) multitool_plan (small tier) to orchestrate email dispatch to the SAM team using the enterprise tool registry once both data sources are ready. No cross_recon needed because the subtasks do not reconcile conflicting data — they simply fetch two independent metrics. All tiers are small because each task is explicit and low-complexity.

output.sql: SELECT vendor_name, SUM(amount_usd) as total_spend, COUNT(*) as invoice_count FROM invoice_facts WHERE vendor_name = 'Microsoft' AND invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND invoice_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY vendor_name

arguments.query: SELECT vendor_name, SUM(amount_usd) as total_spend, COUNT(*) as invoice_count FROM invoice_facts WHERE vendor_name = 'Microsoft' AND invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND invoice_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY vendor_name

arguments.subject: Microsoft License and Spend Summary
arguments.body:
SAM Team Summary Report:

Microsoft Licenses:
Total Count: $1.results[0].total_microsoft_licenses

Microsoft Spend (Last Month):
Vendor: $2.results[0].vendor_name
Total Spend (USD): $2.results[0].total_spend
Invoice Count: $2.results[0].invoice_count

Please review and take any necessary actions.

arguments.details: Sent Microsoft license count ($1.results[0].total_microsoft_licenses) and spend summary ($2.results[0].total_spend USD) to SAM team
